findings.title: GameFlowController never instantiated in production
findings.detail: game_flow_controller.gd defines class GameFlowController with wire_hub/wire_run/wire_end_screen. No production code calls GameFlowController.new() or .setup(). The full Run3D.tscn/HubScreen.tscn/EndRunScreen.tscn flow exists but is NEVER entered. The active game path is the OLD BroceliandeForest3Dâ†’MerlinGame path.
findings.action: Create task to wire GameFlowController into production entry point

findings.title: EndRunScreen faction_ending_chosen signal NOT connected to persistence handler
findings.detail: EndRunScreen.tscn uses scripts/ui/end_run_screen.gd. Its faction_ending_chosen signal is only connected via GameFlowController.wire_end_screen() which is NEVER called. The signal fires but no handler records to echo_memory.
findings.action: Wire faction_ending_chosen in MerlinGameController or end-of-run flow

findings.title: SelectionSauvegarde does not restore interrupted run_state
findings.detail: SelectionSauvegarde._auto_continue() dispatches LOAD_PROFILE (loads meta only) then goes to HubAntre. MerlinSaveSystem has save_run_state/load_run_state but these are never called in the Continue flow. Interrupted runs cannot be resumed.
findings.action: Add run_state check in SelectionSauvegarde._auto_continue() or Hub scene

findings.title: IntroPersonalityQuiz.tscn + SceneRencontreMerlin.tscn exist despite director deletion order
findings.detail: Director q-20260414-005 answered 'B: Supprimer IntroPersonalityQuiz + SceneRencontreMerlin'. Task E2E-DELETE-ORPHAN-SCENES (priority 3) still pending. Both files occupy disk space and may cause confusion.

findings.title: _set_phase() emits signal only â€” no scene transition
findings.detail: GameFlowController._set_phase() calls phase_changed.emit() but does NOT call PixelTransition.transition_to(). Even if wired, a parent orchestrator must listen to phase_changed and drive scene changes. This architectural gap means GameFlowController is incomplete as a standalone scene orchestrator.
findings.action: Add scene transition logic to _set_phase() or document that caller is responsible

findings.title: BroceliandeForest3D:1064 uses store.get('run_state') â€” likely wrong accessor
findings.detail: broceliande_forest_3d.gd:1064 calls store.get('run_state'). MerlinStore stores run data in state['run'], not as a top-level 'run_state' property. The Node.get() method resolves to a Node property accessor, not dictionary key â€” this call may always return null.
findings.action: Verify intended behavior: should be store.state['run'] or save_system.load_run_state()

findings.title: Two end_run_screen.gd files â€” unclear which is canonical
findings.detail: scripts/ui/end_run_screen.gd (old, used by EndRunScreen.tscn) and scripts/run/end_run_screen.gd (new, for GameFlowController). EndRunScreen.tscn links to ui/ version. The run/ version is orphaned (no .tscn references it).

findings.title: SceneSelector debug dropdown has stale MerlinGame reference
findings.detail: SceneSelector.SCENES includes 'MerlinGame' path. This is the old card game scene â€” acceptable for dev debug navigation but should be labeled as (deprecated) in the dropdown.

T-GDC-FACTION-ENDING-INTEGRATION.verdict: PASS (logic correct, 5 new tests added to test_store_run.gd)
T-GDC-FACTION-ENDING-INTEGRATION.detail: StoreRun.check_run_end() correctly includes faction_endings_available in all return paths. MerlinReputationSystem.get_available_endings() checks >= 80.0. Tests added: rep80_included, rep79_excluded, two_factions, empty_rep, present_in_victory.

FACTION-GAME-FLOW-TEST.verdict: PASS (logic correct, 4 new tests added to test_game_flow.gd)
FACTION-GAME-FLOW-TEST.detail: GameFlowController._on_faction_ending_chosen() logic is correct. 4 tests added: records_echo_memory, invalid_no_crash, no_duplicate, null_store_no_crash. WARNING: signal never wired in production (SF-002).

T-E2E-CONTINUE-LOAD-VERIFY.verdict: FAIL - run_state NOT restored on Continue
T-E2E-CONTINUE-LOAD-VERIFY.detail: SelectionSauvegarde._auto_continue() dispatches LOAD_PROFILE (loads meta only) then transitions to HubAntre. MerlinSaveSystem.load_run_state() exists but is never called in this flow. Interrupted runs cannot be resumed. New dev task created: FIX-CONTINUE-RUN-STATE.
